_note: GOOD visual cuelist. The muzzle-flash event (ch01.b07.muzzle_flash.0) and the card-slam event (ch01.b04.character_card_pop.0) and the pin event (ch01.b02.pin_drop.2) are the visual events the impulsive SFX in sound_cuelist.json bind to via event_cue_id. start_s on each is the frame the transient must hit.
